73.reason: [The loop condition `while(~scanf("%d",&type))` will keep reading until EOF, but the problem specifies only one vertex to delete. This causes `del` to be incremented multiple times and corrupts the graph deletion logic. Also, `del` is used as a count, not the actual deleted vertex, leading to incorrect traversal lengths.]
